description: Lock household_electric_refrigerators to the packaged DOMELRE-style domestic electric refrigerator.

checks.reason: The date remains anchored to DOMELRE's 1913 invention.
Mechanical refrigeration is the defining process.
The DOMELRE-style device used an electric motor for household electrical operation.
Early electrical appliances are a broad category rather than the direct component dependency.
Food cold-chain logistics are distribution context, not a household refrigerator construction prerequisite.
